properties.markdown:
# NAVADA EDGE v3 - COMMAND CENTER
**Director**: Lee Akpareva | **Chief of Staff**: Claude AI (Opus 4.6) | **Updated**: 8 March 2026

---

## Network Nodes (Tailscale Mesh VPN, 5 nodes)
| Node | Tailscale IP | LAN/Public IP | Role | Key Services |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **HP (NAVADA)** | 100.121.187.67 | 192.168.0.58 | Database + Bot | PM2: Telegram Bot, Network Scanner, Flix, WorldMonitor, Trading. PostgreSQL :5433 |
| **Oracle VM** | 100.77.206.9 | 132.145.46.184 | **Docker Host** | Docker (11): Nginx, Tunnel, ELK, Grafana, Prometheus, Jenkins, Portainer, Kibana, Excalidraw |
| **EC2 (AWS)** | 100.98.118.33 | 18.130.242.13 | Monitor + Failover | Health Monitor (16 endpoints), Dashboard, WorldView. Auto-sleep when idle |
| **ASUS (Dev)** | 100.88.118.128 | 192.168.0.18 | Control Panel | Claude Code, LM Studio, Ollama, PG17 dev |
| **iPhone** | 100.68.251.111 | Mobile | C2 | Telegram (49+ commands), AWS Mobile App |

---

## Cloudflare Subdomains (11 live, navada-edge-server.uk)
| # | Subdomain | URL | Backend | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **api** | [api.navada-edge-server.uk](https://api.navada-edge-server.uk) | HP :3456 (Telegram/Twilio webhooks) | LIVE |
| 2 | **flix** | [flix.navada-edge-server.uk](https://flix.navada-edge-server.uk) | HP :4000 (Video Streaming) | LIVE |
| 3 | **trading** | [trading.navada-edge-server.uk](https://trading.navada-edge-server.uk) | HP :5678 (FastAPI Trading Lab) | LIVE |
| 4 | **network** | [network.navada-edge-server.uk](https://network.navada-edge-server.uk) | HP :7777 (Network Scanner) | LIVE |
| 5 | **kibana** | [kibana.navada-edge-server.uk](https://kibana.navada-edge-server.uk) | Oracle :5601 (Log Search) | LIVE |
| 6 | **grafana** | [grafana.navada-edge-server.uk](https://grafana.navada-edge-server.uk) | Oracle :3000 (Metrics Dashboard) | LIVE |
| 7 | **monitor** | [monitor.navada-edge-server.uk](https://monitor.navada-edge-server.uk) | Oracle :3001 (Uptime Kuma) | LIVE |
| 8 | **cloudbeaver** | [cloudbeaver.navada-edge-server.uk](https://cloudbeaver.navada-edge-server.uk) | Oracle :8978 (DB Admin) | LIVE |
| 9 | **nodes** | [nodes.navada-edge-server.uk](https://nodes.navada-edge-server.uk) | Oracle (Network Map) | LIVE |
| 10 | **dashboard** | [dashboard.navada-edge-server.uk](https://dashboard.navada-edge-server.uk) | EC2 (Command Centre) | LIVE |
| 11 | **logo** | [logo.navada-edge-server.uk](https://logo.navada-edge-server.uk) | HP :3000 (Logo Service) | LIVE |

---

## CloudWatch Sub-Dashboards (11)
| Dashboard | Focus | Key Metrics |
|---|---|---|
| **NAVADA-Edge-Network** | **Master Console** (this dashboard) | All nodes, subdomains, services |
| NAVADA-HP | HP Server | CPU, Memory, Disk, PM2 processes, port health |
| NAVADA-Oracle | Oracle VM | Docker containers, host resources, tunnels |
| NAVADA-EC2-Operations | AWS EC2 | CPU, network, status checks, auto-sleep |
| NAVADA-PM2-Processes | PM2 Services | Per-process CPU, memory, restarts across all nodes |
| NAVADA-Cloudflare | CDN + Tunnel | Request traffic, cache ratios, tunnel health |
| NAVADA-Tailscale | VPN Mesh | Node connectivity, latency |
| NAVADA-NodeJS | Node.js Runtime | Event loop, heap, GC metrics |
| NAVADA-ASUS | Dev Workstation | ASUS system metrics |
| NAVADA-World-View | Global View | WorldMonitor, geopolitical feeds |
| NAVADA-BK-UP-ULTRA | Backup | Backup status, R2 storage |

---

## Real-Time Event Logging
| Component | Destination | Retention |
|---|---|---|
| **DynamoDB** `navada-edge-logs` | All events: metrics, errors, deploys, emails, Telegram, cron | 30 days (TTL) |
| **CloudWatch Metrics** | HP, Oracle, EC2, Docker namespaces | 15 months |
| **ELK Stack** (Oracle) | Telegram interactions, automation logs, PM2 logs | 30 days |
| **Filebeat** (HP) | Windows host logs -> Elasticsearch | 30 days |

## AWS Serverless Services
| Service | Resource | Status |
|---|---|---|
| **Lambda** | navada-vision-router (detect, yolo, analyse, faces) | Active |
| **API Gateway** | xxqtcilmzi.execute-api.eu-west-2 | Active |
| **SageMaker** | navada-yolov8n (serverless, scales to zero) | Active |
| **Bedrock** | Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Opus 4.6 | Active |
| **Rekognition** | Face collection navada-faces | Active |
| **DynamoDB** | navada-faces, navada-vision-log, navada-edge-logs | Active |
| **S3** | navada-vision-eu-west-2 | Active |
| **CloudWatch** | Auto-sleep alarm (CPU < 5% for 30min -> stop EC2) | Active |
